full_text:
Wang Wei 王威
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Wei (王威). Served Liu Biao and Liu Cong loyally. Died protecting Cong from Cao Cao. Wang Wei was affiliated with Liu Biao.
